description:
Audio Library is one of the most trusted platforms dedicated to providing Background and No Copyright Music for content creators.

✨ *FREE DOWNLOAD HERE:*  https://audiolibrary.com.co/jay-someday/early-bird


✅ *HOW DO I MONETIZE MY VIDEO WITH THIS TRACK?* 

You can use this song for *FREE* in any YouTube video and monetize it—just make sure to include the following in your description *(copy and paste into your description)* 👇

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
Music: Early Bird by Jay Someday https://soundcloud.com/jaysomeday
License: Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0
Free Download / Stream: https://audiolibrary.com.co/jay-someday/early-bird
Music promoted by Audio Library: https://youtu.be/97cUPR_2yLs
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––


🎶 *ABOUT THE SONG* 

"Early Bird" by the talented *Jay Someday* offers a *professional* yet *enthusiastic* soundscape within the *Pop* genre. Its *driving rhythm* and *bright* atmosphere make it a versatile option for *Background Music* , especially for creators focusing on *fashion* , *fitness* , or *daily vlogs* who want to convey a sense of *motivation* and *joy* .


🎶 *KEY MUSICAL SEGMENTS FROM THE SONG* 

0:00 - Intro: Soft synths and light beats set a fresh tone.
0:13 - Main Groove: Rhythmic bass and tropical plucks drive the energy.
0:41 - Build-up: Snare rolls and rising intensity lead to the drop.
0:54 - Main Hook: Catchy synth melodies and vocal chops take center stage.
1:22 - Verse Break: A smoother section before the energy returns.


🎧 *LISTEN ON YOUR FAVORITE PLATFORMS* 

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/6hwFM4HE77JnxWxTZGGa6N
iTunes: https://geo.music.apple.com/co/album/_/1877578564
YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=wyvaEL_Soro


👋 *GET IN TOUCH WITH JAY SOMEDAY* 

jaysomedaymusic@gmail.com
https://jaysomeday.wordpress.com
https://instagram.com/jaysomeday


⚠️ *HOW TO USE THIS MUSIC FOR FREE (GUIDELINES)* 

-  You must include full credits in your video description.
-  You cannot claim the music as your own.
-  You cannot sell, license, or distribute the music in any form.
-  You cannot remove or alter any part of the credits.
-  You cannot use this music as background for your own musical compositions without the artist’s explicit consent.
-  If you wish to use this music in projects outside of YouTube, you must obtain permission from the artist.
-  Failure to comply with these guidelines may result in a copyright claim or strike.
-  If you have any questions or need further clarification, please contact the artist directly.
